purpose: Coding-agent navigation map for the Skill Builder Promptfoo/OpenCode eval harness.
agent_guidance: Start here before adding or changing evals.
Project-specific eval content belongs in packages/<package-name>/, fixtures/, assertions/, or docs/.
Reusable model policy, tier sizing, runtime setup, Promptfoo state export, provider wiring, and guardrails belong in bin/ad-evals.js or scripts/framework/.
Do not add package-local providers; package configs receive providers from scripts/framework/resolve-promptfoo-config.js.
Use npm scripts from tests/evals/package.json rather than invoking promptfoo directly.

directories.bin/: Shared CLI entrypoints. ad-evals.js owns test, smoke, regression, run, view, doctor, and raw promptfoo delegation.
directories.config/: Suite-owned model and tier policy. eval-tiers.toml maps eval_tier metadata to framework provider options.
directories.scripts/framework/: Reusable framework modules for path resolution, environment export, package discovery, provider wiring, resolved Promptfoo config generation, and artifact cleanup guards.
directories.scripts/: Harness tests and compatibility shims. New reusable runtime logic should go under scripts/framework/.
directories.packages/: Project-owned Promptfoo suites. Each package owns promptfooconfig.json or suite YAML, prompt.txt when needed, vars, test cases, and project-specific assertions.
directories.assertions/: Deterministic static contract tests for repo behavior that should not require live model calls.
directories.fixtures/: Static input or expected-output fixtures shared by eval packages and assertions.
directories.docs/: Eval planning, scenario inventory, and package-level rationale for maintainers and coding agents.
directories..cache/: Worktree-local Promptfoo cache generated by the runtime. Ignored.
directories..tmp/: Worktree-local temporary files generated by the runtime. Ignored.
directories.results/: Worktree-local Promptfoo logs and results. Ignored.

framework_files.bin/ad-evals.js: CLI facade that prepares dependency/state env, discovers package configs, and delegates to Promptfoo through the cleanup guard.
framework_files.scripts/framework/paths.js: Resolves repo root, eval root, git common dir, shared state dirs, and worktree-local artifact dirs.
framework_files.scripts/framework/environment.js: Builds Promptfoo/OpenCode environment exports for every CLI command.
framework_files.scripts/framework/package-discovery.js: Discovers package Promptfoo configs for smoke and regression runs.
framework_files.scripts/framework/roots.js: Defines shared eval-root and repo-root constants for framework modules.
framework_files.scripts/framework/eval-tier-config.js: Loads and validates eval tier policy from config/eval-tiers.toml.
framework_files.scripts/framework/resolve-promptfoo-conf: Materializes resolved Promptfoo configs with suite-owned providers and tier-specific options.
Promptfoo provider adapter for running OpenCode CLI agents.
framework_files.scripts/framework/run-promptfoo-with-gua: Runs Promptfoo and prevents cleanup from deleting files outside approved eval artifact paths.

package_contract.smoke_rule: Every package config must include exactly one test whose description starts with [smoke].
package_contract.provider_rule: Package configs must not declare providers.
package_contract.content_owner: Each project owns package prompts, vars, fixtures, and project-specific assertions.

harness-smoke.purpose: Minimal harness smoke suite for validating framework execution.

workspace-eval-generator-system-prompt.purpose: Workspace eval generator system prompt behavior.

state_model.shared_promptfoo_state: Resolved at runtime under the git common dir via scripts/framework/paths.js.
state_model.shared_opencode_state: Resolved at runtime under the git common dir via scripts/framework/paths.js.
state_model.worktree_creation: scripts/worktree.sh does not create Promptfoo symlinks; the CLI prepares dependencies when eval commands run.
